---
title: "How to Teach the New Testament. By Charlotte Mary Yonge (author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”) A Teacher of Many Years’ Standing."
---

## How to Teach the New Testament. By Charlotte Mary Yonge (author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”) A Teacher of Many Years’ Standing.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1881
**Genre:** Non-fiction, theology, advice to church workers
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster.

### Notes

In a series of <i>Religious Manuals for Sunday and Day School Teachers.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
